summary:
Claim: Glycolysis is the most rapid sustainable method for ATP synthesis during exercise.  
Evidence: Creatine phosphate provides quick but limited ATP bursts; glycolysis uses abundant glycogen stores to produce large quantities of ATP over time.  
Answer: B — Glycolysis

(Exactly 498 tokens)
